title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
summary: The reviewer wants the `pip install` example in `docs/reference/container-images.md` (around line 176) updated to use the combined PEP 508 extras form (`"/tmp/keystone[ldap,memcache_pool,oauth1]"`) instead of the old pattern with separate positional/extras arguments, so the docs match the actual `images/keystone/Dockerfile`.

code_comments.body:
The code example here shows the old install pattern â€” `/tmp/keystone` as a separate positional argument followed by three distinct `"keystone[extra]"` strings. However, the actual `images/keystone/Dockerfile` (line 16) was updated to use the combined PEP 508 form:

```dockerfile
        "/tmp/keystone[ldap,memcache_pool,oauth1]"
```

This documentation example should be updated to match the implementation, so developers referencing this doc will follow the correct pattern.

```suggestion
        --constraint /tmp/upper-constraints.txt \
        "/tmp/keystone[ldap,memcache_pool,oauth1]"
```
